claim: UNICEF estimates 2.3 million neonatal deaths in 2022, with SSA and South Asia accounting for over 80 percent, and three causes — prematurity, birth asphyxia, sepsis — responsible for 75 percent of deaths.

source.title: Levels and Trends in Child Mortality 2024

method: Reviewed UNICEF child mortality report, neonatal mortality data, and cause-of-death breakdown.
limitations: Cause-of-death data depends on verbal autopsy where vital registration is incomplete.
